/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/rosstackexe.dir/src/rosstack_main.cpp.o -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rospack/bin/rosstack  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rospack/lib: /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rospack/lib/librospack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -ltinyxml2 -lpython3.10
